text:
Admitted Gilgo Beach, New York, serial killer Rex Heuermann likes to read about serial killers

Clinical and forensic psychologist Dr. Rachel Toles discussed possible psychological motivations in the case.

author: ABC News YouTube
text:
United flight struck pole, not truck as it landed at Newark last month
The National Transportation Safety Board has released preliminary findings into its probe of a scary incident at Newark International Airport last month determining that a United Airlines flight was just 15 feet above the New Jersey Turnpike when it hit a light pole and came close to a passing truck.

author: ABC News YouTube
text:
Homicide convictions reversed for paramedics involved in 2019 death of Elijah McClain
The Colorado Court of Appeals reversed the convictions of two former Aurora paramedics, who were convicted in December 2023 of criminally negligent homicide in the 2019 death of Elijah McClain, a 23-year-old unarmed Black man who was walking home from a convenience store.
 
In reversing the convictions, the judge ruled on Thursday that the case should be sent back to the district court for a possible retrial.
